channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260620.1)
item.description:
What's New

fix(telex): preserve horn when extending vowel after horned+toned syllable

insertAOE stripped TONEW_MASK (horn/breve) from every vowel in the cluster

when adding a circumflex (aa->a^), so typing "wfa" then holding 'a' turned

"ua" into "uaa" with the horn on u silently dropped.

Only strip the horn when the circumflex target is itself horned (breaking a

horn diphthong, e.g. cuoi+o -> cuoi). For a plain target next to a horned

vowel (ua+a) keep the neighbour's horn; post-transform validation then

rejects the invalid cluster and falls back to inserting the literal vowel.

Symmetric for o-horn. Adds regression tests.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
